Low-End Recording and the Livehouse

Livehouse Series REVIEW 2026.04.03

Low-End Recording and the Livehouse

A review of the texture created by low-budget recording and the sound of the livehouse.

Not only polished sound deserves attention.

Noise, compression, and spatial residue can preserve the memory of performance.
